creator: jpaetzel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Adding the user and group automatically only happens if the PARANOIA OPTION is selected, which 
is the default.  If you make rmconfig && make -DBATCH install it will work.  A more interesting 
question would be why is PARANOIA an option if it's seemingly required by the startup script, 
but at this point in the software's life cycle I'm not going to risk breaking existing 
installations by changing the port.
